resources.string: Allow access to all files to store notes in the shared folder %1$s.
%1$s is already enabled.
Allow %1$s in the system dialog.
Enable %1$s in Android app settings.
%1$s is not enabled. You can enable it from the button in the permission list.
Call screening role is active.
Call screening role is not active. The setting will not change the next time the app opens.
Shared file access was not allowed. The setting was disabled and notes will be stored in the app\'s private storage.
Display over other apps permission was granted.
Display over other apps permission was not granted. The setting was disabled and the app will use a system popup.
Full-screen Call Report popup permission was granted.
Allow notifications so system popups can be shown.
Allow Phone so the app can detect the start and end of calls.
Allow Call log so the app can show recent calls.
Allow Contacts so the app can show names instead of only phone numbers.
Allow Write contacts for compatibility with older contact notes.
Allow Full-screen popup on the system screen.
Display over other apps is already allowed.
Shared notes folder is active: %1$s
Shared folder is allowed, but moving the notes failed.
Call screening / Caller ID role is not available on this phone. The setting remains unchanged.
The main permissions were checked. Notes are in %1$s.
